title: Carrier Sell Orders
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Commodity) AS orders FROM CarrierTradeOrder WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND SaleOrder > 0 AND (CancelTrade IS NULL OR CancelTrade = 0)
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Commodity_Localised, Commodity) AS Commodity, SUM(SaleOrder) AS Quantity, ROUND(AVG(Price), 2) AS 'Avg Price' FROM CarrierTradeOrder WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND SaleOrder > 0 AND (CancelTrade IS NULL OR CancelTrade = 0) GROUP BY Commodity, Commodity_Localised ORDER BY SUM(SaleOrder) DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {orders} commodities offered for sale on your carrier during the report period. Sell orders represent your inventory for visiting commanders to purchase, showcasing the diversity and scale of your trading operation.
details.help: CarrierTradeOrder fires when a trade order is listed. This aggregates all active sell orders by commodity to show trading volume and pricing.

tagLines: Carrier sell orders catalogued. Your inventory attracted buyers from across the galaxy.
Your trading stock recorded. Commanders found profitable goods aboard your carrier.
Sale orders fulfilled and restocked. Your carrier's market reputation grew stronger.
